title: Cotolay
writer: Luis Ligero, José Antonio Nieves Conde, Luis Antonio Ruiz
actors: Vicente Parra, Didier Haudepin, José Bódalo
plot: The plot is loosely based on the legend from Galicia in north-west Spain of the founding by St Francis of Assisi (1182-1226) of the Convent of San Francisco near Santiago de Compostela in 1214 with the help of a poor charcoal burn...
